name: telegram-ai-bot-pro
description: A versatile Telegram AI bot with multi-model chat, memory, admin controls, tools, and multimodal helpers.

scripts.test:quick: node --test test/config.test.js test/telegram-utils.test.js test/conversation-utils.test.js test/tool-access-policy.test.js test/provider-loader.test.js test/phase-g.smoke.test.js test/ai-fallback-regression.test.js test/runtime-config-validation.test.js test/menu-inline-regression.test.js test/image-menu-regression.test.js test/voice-menu-regression.test.js test/file-menu-regression.test.js test/admin-menu-regression.test.js test/back-to-main-menu-regression.test.js test/admin-ai-test-regression.test.js test/compact-callback-replies-regression.test.js test/simplify-command-menu-regression.test.js test/admin-power-pack-regression.test.js test/ux-power-pack-regression.test.js test/toolbox-power-pack-regression.test.js test/menu-target-reference-regression.test.js test/settings-center-regression.test.js test/productize-core-regression.test.js test/bottom-keyboard-status-regression.test.js test/real-tools-clean-output-regression.test.js test/product-agent-regression.test.js test/search-translate-output-regression.test.js test/natural-agent-regression.test.js test/human-like-agent-regression.test.js
scripts.test:regression: node --test test/db.test.js test/access-control-service.test.js test/admin-api-server.test.js test/ai-client-factory.test.js test/provider-loader.test.js test/phase-g.regression.test.js
scripts.test:full: npm run test:quick && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:regression
scripts.test:release: npm run test:full && npm run test:load && npm run test:fault
scripts.check:syntax: find src test scripts -name "*.js" -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 node --check
scripts.verify: npm run check:secrets && npm run check:syntax && npm run test:quick
scripts.predeploy: npm run doctor && npm run verify && npm run docker:verify
scripts.docker:verify: npm run docker:build && npm run docker:doctor
